ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Continued To Dec-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gadi Zohar, via ZOOM, counsel for Barbara Jeanne Wright, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that the language used in the T. Rowe Price letter is sufficient to indicate Mr. Wright's intentions with regard to the disbursements stated within the letter. After additional discussion, there being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated July 25, 2019 is admitted to probate. Barbara Jean Wright is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 31, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Continued To May-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gadi Zohar, via ZOOM, counsel for Barbara Jean Wright, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court queries counsel as to why the document submitted, dated July 25, 2019, is not directions to pay on death. Mr. Zohar reports to the court that T. Rowe Price will not accept the document for purposes of distribution. The court queries regarding whether there was a Trust in the Philippines. Counsel reports that there was no estate in the Philippines but confirms the existence of a will but only as to the properties located in the Philippines. Counsel offered to submit a copy of the will, attached as an Exhibit to a declaration, from the Philippines to the court for consideration.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to May 11, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Continued To Apr-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
